recipe_overrides_legacy_uk_saas.rationale: Sovereign / air-gapped route per Principle 21. SBD swapped for MOD Secure by Design (JSP 440 / 604, Security Aspects Letter). SVCASS skipped — not a public-facing GDS service; assurance gates flow through MOD accreditation pathway, not GDS Service Standard. AIP retained because AI is pluggable per ADR-004 (sovereign customer can point at on-premise model).

build_status: BUILD COMPLETE — recipe + post-build hooks both successful

RISK.headline: 13 risks; 5 inherent-Critical (R-001 strategic accreditation fail, R-002 MOD-SbD fail, R-007 boundary egress, R-004 supply-chain, R-005 SAL controls). 5 risks exceed sovereign Very-Low compliance appetite.

SOBC.headline: Option C (single-codebase + sovereign overlay) recommended. NPV 5-yr +£1.86M; BCR(system) >2.0; payback ~30 months post-bias.

PLAN.headline: Pilot ATO 2027-07-25; GA (LTS-1) 2027-10-31. Critical path: pre-deployment must-lands (HSM/CI/accreditator review), SaaS GA dependency W60, JSP 604 Pilot ATO.

ROADMAP.headline: 3-year horizon. Y1 GA 2027-10-31; Y2 multi-site (4 sites + LTS-2); Y3 5+ sites incl. IC partner + SLSA L4. Cross-subsidy ≥25% margin sustained from Y1.

TCOP.headline: 9/13 Compliant + 3/13 Partial + 1/13 N/A (Point 13 Service Standard replaced by MOD accreditation pathway). Point 5 Cloud First N/A — JSP 440/604 override.

MOD-SBD.headline: MOD SbD 6/7 fully compliant + 1/7 partial (Through-Life Assurance). JSP 440 28/28 controls mapped. JSP 604 readiness: Pre-Accreditation Evidence Pack Forming. R-002/R-005 residual position accepted.

DPIA.headline: Vendor-narrow scope (deploying authority is data controller for tenant content). 0/9 ICO criteria met → DPIA not legally required, produced for transparency. 5 LOW residual privacy risks. ICO Art.36 NOT REQUIRED.

AIP.headline: 129/160 = 81% Good. LOW-risk when AI enabled (drafting-only); N/A when disabled. Principle 8 inverted (vendor not AI supplier); ATRS responsibility split (vendor for abstraction, customer for deployed instance).

HLD.headline: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS — 3 blocking items (diagrams pending W5/6, MOD-SBD/DPIA inputs pending W4, end-to-end air-gap CI walkthrough unevidenced) + 4 advisory.

DIAG-C4.headline: C4 Context (10 nodes) + Container (14) + Component (11). Single accredited boundary with zero outbound edges; AIAdaptor reuse at L3 — single-codebase discharged.

DIAG-SEQ.headline: 5 sequence diagrams: bundle issue+ceremony, JIT elevation, on-prem AI generation, break-glass, CVE hotfix. 16 alt-failure branches.

DIAG-DEP.headline: 3 views: accredited-boundary single-tenant topology, bundle issue+distribution path, trust-zone separation with vendor↔customer no-runtime-trust links.

DEVOPS.headline: Dual-output pipeline (SaaS + sovereign bundle from one revision). 3 release-blocking gates: reproducibility cross-build digest match, network-deny smoke (zero outbound), HSM-OVM signing M-of-N + SLSA L3 + dual SBOM. Annual LTS 24-month support.

FINOPS.headline: Per-site cost-to-serve ~£250k–£850k Y1 (median ~£500k); ~£250k/yr steady. ≥25% margin → SaaS cross-subsidy floor. Top levers: LTS concurrency, per-site amortisation, HSM utilisation.

OPS.headline: Vendor scope: bundle issue+sign, LTS patch stream, evidence-pack refresh, opt-in remote support, VDP. Customer scope: deployed-instance lifecycle. ATO hand-over pivot. Patch SLA 7d Critical / 30d High / 90d Medium.

TRACE.headline: 100% forward chain coverage. 13/13 risks traced. TCoP 13/13, MOD-SbD 7/7, JSP 440 control families mapped, JSP 604 4/4 gates, DPIA 5/5, AIP 16/16. Cross-project linkage to 001 documented per Principle 21.

ORG_RESEARCH.topic: Target organisation strategy, structure, and existing systems

RESEARCH.headline: Sovereign deployment is overwhelmingly ADOPT not BUY — air-gap excludes hyperscaler managed services. Single load-bearing BUILD investment is sovereign packaging+LTS pipeline (~£1.6M 3-yr). Default sovereign AI = NVIDIA Triton+vLLM+open-weight on customer GPUs; FIPS 140-3 L3 HSMs for vendor signing.

AWS_RESEARCH.headline: AWS Outposts NOT suitable for MOD air-gap (requires service-link). Snowball Edge with EKS Anywhere is only AWS substrate supporting fully disconnected operation. No UK sovereign AWS region exists — recommend substrate-agnostic sealed-bundle install per ADR-007.

AZURE_RESEARCH.headline: Azure Local with Disconnected Operations is the strategic sovereign substrate (foundation of MS Sovereign Private Cloud). Foundry Local on Azure Local is supported on-prem AI path for ADR-004. Vendor has zero Azure consumption cost — customer pays MS direct.

GCP_RESEARCH.headline: GDC Air-Gapped is only viable Google customer-side runtime. Two-plane sovereign delivery: vendor build plane in europe-west2 producing signed bundles → sealed media → customer GDC Air-Gapped at MOD site. Vertex AI on GDC Air-Gapped resolves Conflict C-4.

JSP_936.headline: 18/23 controlling rows vendor-side COMPLIANT (~78%); 5 rows structurally RAISO-to-complete for deployed instance (vendor-narrow scope). Risk MAJOR (12/25). Approval pathway: Defence-Level (JROC/IAC) for deployed instance; vendor ARB+AI Ethics Reviewer for abstraction.

DIAG-AIRGAP.headline: Single Mermaid flowchart TB: accredited perimeter, vendor-side build/sign trust zone, sealed-media one-way ingress with 5-step verification ceremony, customer-side runtime with 6 customer-controlled foundational services + 8-container ArcKit runtime. Zero outbound edges — air-gap rendered as deliberate absence.

arckit:health.headline: 0 HIGH / 2 MEDIUM / 0 LOW. ORPHAN-REQ counts: project 001 13/70, project 002 6/63 — substantially reduced from baseline 63/63 pre-build.

arckit:pages.headline: 47 artefacts in manifest (27 project-001 + 15 project-002 + 5 global). docs/index.html, manifest.json, llms.txt regenerated.
